tagline: दो दिल, एक सफ़र — और यह सफ़र अभी शुरू हो रहा है
tagline_en: Two hearts, one journey — and it begins now

story.title: How It Began
story.text: It was an arranged meeting, but the moment their eyes met, something felt different. Families had arranged it, but the heart had already decided.

story.title: Getting to Know You
story.text: Long calls, shared playlists, and stolen glances. Every conversation felt like coming home.

story.title: Forever Decided
story.text: When the moment came, no grand gesture was needed. Just two people knowing, with quiet certainty, that this was it.

venue.name: Solaris Hotel & Club
venue.address: Near Jay Nagar, Rajiv Gandhi Circle, Indore, MP 452001
